page.content:
In Table 1, titled "Breast Milk | Aflatoxin M1", there are four rows under the headers n, Positive Samples (%), Range (ng/g), and Mean a (ng/g). The first row labeled "89" shows no positive samples with a value of "-", a range of "n.d.", and a mean of "-". The second row labeled "3" reports 100% positive samples, with a range of "0.013–0.015" ng/g and a mean of "0.014 ± 0.001" ng/g. The third row labeled "2" also indicates 100% positive samples, with a range of "0.022–0.025" ng/g and a mean of "0.024 ± 0.002" ng/g. The total row labeled "Total: 94" shows 5.3% positive samples, a range of "n.d.–0.025" ng/g, and a mean of "0.018 ± 0.005" ng/g.

In Table 2, titled "No. | Clinical features | CPE | ALI/ARDS", the first row "1" lists clinical features as "PCWP in right heart catheterization (if examined), mmHg" with CPE "> 18" and ALI/ARDS "≤ 18". The second row "2" describes "Culture results and/or immunological test for infections" with CPE as "Negative" and ALI/ARDS as "Positive". The third row "3" mentions "LVEF < 50% and/or diastolic dysfunction on echocardiography" with CPE as "Present" and ALI/ARDS as "Absent". The fourth row "4" indicates "Pleural effusion on chest radiographs" with CPE as "Present" and ALI/ARDS as "Absent". The fifth row "5" states "PaO2 / FiO2 > 400 within 3 days after diuresis" with CPE as "Present" and ALI/ARDS as "Absent".
